title: Tschudya lanata
taxonomy: Tschudya lanata is classified as a species within the genus Tschudya, which belongs to the family Apiaceae. This classification places it within the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Apiaceae family, it shares characteristics with other plants commonly known as caraway or carrot family. The exact classification may be subject to change based on ongoing taxonomic research.
